name: Atherosclerotic Cardiovascular Disease Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease including coronary artery disease, acute and subsequent myocardial infarction, cerebral infarction, occlusion of precerebral and cerebral arteries, atherosclerosis, and peripheral vascular disease. Used in cardiovascular statin therapy and ASCVD-related quality measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
